relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Growth reveals a neglected table: widows are being overlooked.
The twelve refuse to abandon the word, yet the need must be served.
Seven Spirit-and-wisdom-filled people are sought for practical justice.
Prayer and word-service remain the apostolic center.
The community chooses Stephen, Philip, and five others for the need.
Prayer and laid hands appoint them.
The word grows and even priests enter the trust.
Stephen moves in grace, power, wonders, and signs.
Dispute rises from synagogue circles of the diaspora.
His wisdom and Spirit-speaking cannot be withstood.
People, elders, and scribes are agitated into seizure.
False witnesses frame him as enemy of holy place and Law.
Jesus, temple, and Moses-custom become the disputed field.
Stephen’s face shines like a messenger before the council.
